# Bitdefender | Global Leader in Cybersecurity

> Bitdefender is a cybersecurity leader delivering best-in-class threat prevention, detection, and response solutions worldwide. Bitdefender provides cybersecurity solutions with leading security efficacy, performance and ease of use to consumers, small and medium businesses, and mid-market enterprises.


---

## Mission & Value Proposition

Guided by a vision to be the world’s most trusted cybersecurity solutions provider, Bitdefender is committed to defending organizations and individuals around the globe against cyberattacks to transform and improve their digital experience. Bitdefender protects millions of users across 170 countries, delivering award-winning solutions that combine innovation, performance, and ease of use. Bitdefender's commitment extends beyond technology; Bitdefender collaborates with global law enforcement to dismantle cybercriminal networks, discover, and expose emerging threats, and help make the digital world a safer place.

**Unique Values:**

* Pioneering AI in cybersecurity since 2008.
* 580+ patents filed, including breakthroughs in machine learning and advanced threat detection.
* 50+ billion threats blocked every year.
* 25 years of security innovations with consistent top ratings in independent security tests.


---------------------------------------
# Consumer Security Solutions

### Description
Bitdefender's **Consumer Security Solutions** deliver trusted digital protection for individuals and families across all major operating systems. 
- [Individual Plans](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/consumer/individual): Digital life protection plans for individuals.
- [Family Plans](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/consumer/family): Digital life protection plans for families.

### All-in-one Digital Life Protection Plans
- [Bitdefender Ultimate Security](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/consumer/ultimate-security): All-in-one security plan including advanced device protection, scams protection, unlimited VPN for private browsing, password manager and digital identity protection.
- [Bitdefender Premium Security](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/consumer/premium-security): Award-winning protection against digital threats, including advanced scams protection, unlimited VPN for private browsing, plus password manager and email breach check.
- [Bitdefender Total Security](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/consumer/total-security): Award-winning protection against digital threats across devices and online activities, plus password manager and email breach check.
- [Bitdefender Ultimate Small Business Security](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/consumer/small-business-security): The perfect plan for small business owners looking for low-maintenance security with zero compromises.

### Device Security Products
- [Bitdefender Antivirus Plus](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/consumer/antivirus): Award-winning antivirus protection that keeps you safe online.
- [Bitdefender Free Antivirus](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/consumer/free-antivirus): The best free antivirus protection for all digital threats.
- [Bitdefender Antivirus for Mac](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/consumer/antivirus-for-mac): Absolute antivirus protection against Mac-related threats.
- [Bitdefender Mobile Security for Android](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/consumer/mobile-security-android): Best protection for Android devices.

### Privacy and Identity Products
- [Bitdefender Premium VPN](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/consumer/vpn): Unlimited encrypted traffic, worldwide coverage, blazing-fast speeds.
- [Bitdefender SecurePass](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/consumer/password-manager): A password manager designed for the most cautious users.
- [Bitdefender Digital Identity Protection](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/consumer/digital-identity-protection): Protection from the dangers of data breaches by monitoring personal data in real-time.
- [Bitdefender Identity Theft Protection](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/consumer/identity-theft-protection): One-stop credit monitoring and identity theft protection service.

----------

# Business Security Solutions

### Description
Bitdefender's **Business Security Solutions** deliver the GravityZone cybersecurity platform — unifying prevention, protection, detection, and response across endpoints, identities, cloud, email, and network — optimized for organizations of 500–5,000 employees with lean IT and security teams. 
- [Bitdefender Business Solutions Group](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/business/): Where top-rated protection meets the tireless spirit of growing businesses. Proven prevention, protection, detection, and response, backed by industry-leading experts.
- [Bitdefender GravityZone](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/business/gravityzone-platform/): Bitdefender GravityZone unifies prevention, protection, detection and response into a single platform that makes security feel simple and effortless.

### Security Packages
- [GravityZone Security Packages](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/business/compare): Overview and comparison of GravityZone security platform tiers from endpoint protection through full XDR
- [GravityZone Business Security Enterprise](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/business/products/gravityzone-enterprise-security): The ultimate cybersecurity solution combining advanced prevention, extended detection and response, risk analytics, and single-agent architecture; includes HyperDetect tunable machine learning, Fileless Attack Defense, Sandbox Analyzer, and EDR; reduces security efforts by up to 70% and incidents by up to 85%.
- [GravityZone Business Security Premium](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/business/products/gravityzone-premium-security): Advanced cybersecurity solution with automated threat prevention, remediation, incident analysis, and cloud-based sandboxing using signature-less technologies including machine learning, behavior analysis, and integrated sandbox in a single agent-single console.
- [GravityZone Business Security](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/business/smb-products/business-security): Endpoint protection for SMBs combining machine learning, behavioral analysis, and continuous process monitoring; includes ransomware mitigation, network attack defense, and a single integrated management console.
- [GravityZone Small Business Security](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/business/products/gravityzone-small-business-security): Modular security platform for small businesses providing ransomware protection, phishing prevention, and fileless attack defense with a straightforward all-in-one management interface.

### Prevention and Protection
- [GravityZone PHASR](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/business/products/gravityzone-phasr): Stop ransomware and other attacks before they compromise your EDR. PHASR’s Dynamic Attack Surface Reduction (DASR) augments GravityZone and 3rd party EDR tools by proactively closing attack paths.
- [GravityZone Compliance Manager](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/business/products/gravityzone-compliance-manager): GravityZone Compliance Manager streamlines regulatory alignment by offering out-of-the-box support for major compliance frameworks, including GDPR, PCI DSS, NIS 2 Directive, CISv8, SOC 2, CMMC 2.0, HIPAA, ISO 27001, Cyber Essentials (UK) and more*, to help organizations meet complex regulatory requirements.
- [GravityZone EASM](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/business/products/gravityzone-easm): Proactively discover, monitor, and secure all internet-facing assets - before attackers exploit them.
- [GravityZone Extended Email Security](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/business/products/gravityzone-extended-email-security):Cloud-native, API-enabled and secure email gateway (SEG) email protection. Designed for organizations and MSPs, it helps stop ransomware, phishing, and BEC both before they reach the inbox and post-delivery.

### Detection and Response
- [GravityZone Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR)](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/business/products/endpoint-detection-response): Effectively stop ransomware and breaches with automated cross-endpoint correlation and seamlessly integrated prevention, protection, detection and response.
- [GravityZone Extended Detection and Response (XDR)](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/business/products/gravityzone-xdr): Achieve unparalleled detection and response speed and efficiency across endpoints, identities, network, SaaS applications, cloud workloads, mobile devices and beyond.

### Managed Detection and Response (MDR)
- [Bitdefender Managed Detection and Response Services (SOC)](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/business/services/managed-services):Attackers work around the clock. And so do we. Bitdefender MDR service provides 24x7 defense against cyber threats delivered through our global SOCs.


## MSP Solutions
- [GravityZone for Managed Service Providers](https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/business/products/managed-service-providers-security): GravityZone platform for MSPs providing multi-tenant centralized management, RMM and PSA integrations, risk analytics, and access to MDR services.

----------

- [Bitdefender Spain](https://www.bitdefender.com/es-es/): Bitdefender - Líder mundial en software de seguridad informática
- [Bitdefender Italy](https://www.bitdefender.com/it-it/): Bitdefender - Leader globale nel software di sicurezza informatica
- [Bitdefender Romania](https://www.bitdefender.com/ro-ro/): Bitdefender - Lider global software de securitate cibernetică
